target_property: Mid-chassis frame cross-member wall thickness and bracket configuration supporting front fuel-line / shield interfaces
system_context: Assess reuse of mid-chassis brackets as HV cable tray attachment planes
inference_forbidden_reason: Sheet thickness and bracket shear capacity are not inferable from bumper-plane datums or frame rail outside width.
engineering_risk: Localized fatigue / overstressed webs if HV tray loads guessed onto unknown gauge.

best_source_tiers.source_class: Ford Collision Repair Manual / body repair section cuts (if configuration-applicable)
best_source_tiers.notes: Not acquired. Do not invent thicknesses.
